_meta.experiment: #58 FAITHFUL MoE distillation on Qwen/Qwen1.5-MoE-A2.7B (fused experts reached)
_meta.quant: sasori K-plane joint-ridge g=256, fake-quant; fake_quant reaches FUSED experts (48 tensors x 60 experts = 2880 expert_mats ternarized) + 168 nn.Linear (attn+shared_expert)
_meta.distill: LoRA-KD rank=64, 300 steps, corpus=GSM8K-train n=300; skip=attention-only (no expert correction), shared=FusedExpertLoRA (1 low-rank correction on each MoE block output, 6.3M params)
_meta.design_note: In transformers 5.12 Qwen2Moe experts are FUSED 3-D tensors, not nn.Linear -> the per-expert-LoRA OOM of the original #58 framing does NOT apply; FusedExpertLoRA corrects the block output instead. per_expert oracle N/A (no nn.Linear per expert).

verdict: FAITHFUL MoE collapse reproduced (FP 0.64 -> K2 0.007, experts really ternarized, unlike the attention-only flagship 30B). Distillation recovers; K3+distill = FP (lossless), consistent with Paper H. NEGATIVE (central): correcting the fused experts (shared) does NOT beat attention-only (skip) on flexible accuracy (K2 +0.013, K3 +0.00) -> recovery is ATTENTION-DOMINATED; the de-risk N=30 signal (+0.067) was noise. Strict-match K3_shared 0.44 >> K3_skip 0.31 (+0.13) but strict is format-sensitive (hypothesis, not reasoning). Caveats: 1 model, 1 corpus, 1 seed, N=150, GSM8K only.
